title: pilosella erythriophylla
intro: Pilosella erythriophylla, also known as Red Clover Balsam, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pilosella erythriophylla include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to be used in traditional medicine.
